title: Instrument Group
description: A constraint within an allowed combination that defines which instrument types can fill this group and how many are permitted.

types.description: Instrument types accepted by this group (OR logic). Any listed type qualifies.

min.description: Minimum number of instruments required from this group. Defaults to 0 (optional).

max.description: Maximum number of instruments allowed from this group. Defaults to 1. MUST be greater than or equal to `min`.
